examples.subject: CCTV blind spot – Carpark Level 1
examples.details: Three cameras offline covering entire Level 1 south section.

examples.subject: Intruder detected – rooftop after hours
examples.details: Motion sensors triggered on restricted rooftop area at 23:15. Unclear if threat.
examples.suggested_resolution: Secure rooftop area and review access logs.
examples.final_resolution: Area secured; access logs reviewed; door lock replaced.

examples.subject: Parking access card system – repeated failures
examples.details: Customer parking access cards failing at gate reader. Issue recurring for third time this month.
examples.employee_resolution: Card re-encode insufficient — server-side permission sync required.
examples.final_resolution: Cards re-encoded; permission sync completed. Readers all operational.

examples.subject: Gas leak alarm – Main kitchen
examples.details: Gas sensor triggered in building kitchen. Evacuated area as precaution.
examples.suggested_resolution: Isolate gas supply and replace faulty valve.
examples.final_resolution: Gas supply isolated; faulty valve replaced and area cleared for re-entry.

examples.subject: Server room overheating
examples.details: Server room temperature crossed 28°C threshold. Backup cooling unit fault.
examples.suggested_resolution: Activate backup cooling; repair primary unit.
examples.final_resolution: Backup cooling activated; primary compressor replaced.

examples.subject: Water ingress – basement carpark flooding
examples.details: Heavy rain caused flooding in basement carpark. Vehicles and equipment at risk.
examples.suggested_resolution: Deploy pumping crew and clear drainage channels.
examples.final_resolution: Pumping crew deployed; drainage channel cleared.

examples.subject: Chiller plant failure – building-wide cooling
examples.details: Main chiller breakdown caused complete loss of cooling across all floors.
examples.final_resolution: Compressor replaced and refrigerant recharged. Cooling restored.

examples.subject: Fire suppression system test failure – server room
examples.details: Annual suppression test failed. System will not trigger on test activation.
examples.final_resolution: Suppression head replaced; system retested — full pass. Certificate issued.

examples.subject: Boiler failure – Building A heating
examples.details: Entire Building A without heating during winter. Heat exchanger fault.
examples.suggested_resolution: Replace heat exchanger and restore pressure.
examples.final_resolution: Heat exchanger replaced; boiler pressure normalised. Heating restored.

examples.subject: UPS batteries below minimum capacity
examples.details: Data centre UPS batteries flagged at 18% capacity. Emergency runtime insufficient.
examples.employee_resolution: Batteries degraded beyond recharge — full module replacement required.
examples.final_resolution: All 12 UPS battery modules replaced; 47-minute runtime certified.

examples.subject: Power outage – Finance floor
examples.details: Complete power failure affecting Finance department. UPS not kicking in.
examples.suggested_resolution: Reset tripped MCB and test UPS bypass.
examples.final_resolution: Faulty MCB replaced; power restored. UPS tested operational.
